title: Dark Tale
description: Adds a new ingredient "Dark Metal" which you can make armor and tools with.
body: This mod adds a new ore called Dark Metal that spawns in the end and can be used to make armor tools and a new weapon, the Scythe! Dark Metal can spawn in the end and then can be smelted into dark metal bars, dark metal bars can be mixed with 4 sticks to make Dark Rod's. Dark Rod's are the sticks to dark metal tools.
